problem: Is dopamine dysregulation cause or effect in schizophrenia — what is primary?
hypothesis: If BDNF upregulation to promote neurogenesis is applied to what, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
